title: Madness cubed mod
description: This mod adds various things from the old game - madness cubed. There are monsters, blocks, vehicles, weapons, mechanics and more.
body:
Russian and English languages are available in this mod.(English is a pretty bad translation, since I'm not a native speaker.)

# Added things:

## Blocks

![blocks](https://steamuserimages-a.akamaihd.net/ugc/2372903075431015064/11E760C305434DAB052A58F6F2A0316FCCBB3B23/)

## Decorations

![decor](https://steamuserimages-a.akamaihd.net/ugc/2460725804007794086/15901369EF00543F06EB5D5CA1FEA83D68D11C56/)

## Guns: ![guns](https://steamuserimages-a.akamaihd.net/ugc/2372903075431012808/F2CE36595F2267D5E1DBA1C0F0AD2E9BA685F6D7/)

### Pickaxe,  Baseball bat,  Pigal,  Uzi,  Shotgun,  Sawn-off shotgun,  Riffle,  Sniper rifle,  Laser sniper Rifle,  Bazooka,  BFG,  Magic wand (creative only),  Peashotter (Command only)

## Equipment:
![eqiup](https://steamuserimages-a.akamaihd.net/ugc/2372903075431013909/39CD372F41BC9C7BFEBDD889F56E8C2E35680D8C/)

### Jetpack,  Antigravitator,  Life Water,  Cartridges for each type of weapon,  Trees,  Money,  Music discs with music from the game


## Entities:


### All types of cartridges except uranium

![monsters](https://steamuserimages-a.akamaihd.net/ugc/2460725804007857392/20ACF0A900C4DB5197DA73F2D82AE2DBB0F173F9/)

### Monsters:

An ordinary zombie 

Zombie cop

Zombie miner 

Zombie Soldier 

Demon 

Zombie stalker

Zombie boss

### Transport:
![transport](https://steamuserimages-a.akamaihd.net/ugc/2460725804007856874/767DF6B5DD6958DF6E6A67EF64076E5210BF7405/)

Quad bike

Banshee (Unfinished)

Turret


## Added features:

When you die, you switch to the observer mode for 15 seconds and you can either be reborn by buying live water, or die by losing all cartridges and items not purchased in the store.

The antigravitator softens the fall damage and gives a double jump

Jetpack gives you the opportunity to fly in a limited way

A store(Button "V") with the ability to withdraw money, and buy weapons, equipment and skins.

Zombie towers (Zombies can stand on top of each other to get to you)

The first six slots in the inventory are for weapons. And they can be changed by pressing the number of the slot, as well as turn on the Builder mode by pressing the "H" button.

The turret has an overload

Weapon animations
